title: prospipto #4363
definition:
1) to fall forwards, fall down, prostrate one's self before,
    in homage or supplication: at one's feet
 2) to rush upon, beat against
    2a) of winds beating upon a house
nasbUsage:

 2) to rush upon, beat against
